title: Vision Update
summary: Recently, both of our websites have been taken down - Google Sites, and now Canvas. But this isn't the end.
body: This is just the upgraded version of Vision 1.0 and 2.0 combined. More features, more games, and way more access to things we couldn't even fit into the old sites.
No matter how many times things get removed or blocked, it just pushes us to build smarter, stronger, and better than before.
